title: Show HN: Baton – A desktop app for developing with AI agents
full_text:
Know when every agent needs you
 

 Labeled status badges appear on workspace cards the moment an agent finishes, hits
 an error, or needs your input. Each badge tells you exactly what happened at a
 glance. No polling, no tab-switching — just glance at the sidebar. Support varies
 by agent — best supported by Claude Code.
 
 
 

 
 
 
 "Input" badge (blue) when an agent is waiting for input
 
 

 
 
 
 "Done" badge (green) when a turn completes successfully
 
 

 
 
 
 "Error" badge (red) when an agent reports an error
 
 

 
 
 
 One-click notification setup for supported agents
